title: Provisioning rollback → cleanup on failure
evidence: All 11 TC-014 tests passed in 1475ms: - ✓ Provision fails → HTTP 500, status=FAILED, provision_attempts=1 - ✓ data_dir does NOT exist after rollback (cleaned up) - ✓ TENANT_PROVISION_FAILED audit event written (actor=system) - ✓ TENANT_PROVISIONED audit event absent (no success) - ✓ Retry with attempts<3 → 200 FAILED (returns existing record) - ✓ With attempts=3 → HTTP 409 (cap enforced, "Max provision attempts reached") - ✓ tenant status permanently FAILED with attempts >= 3 Total suite: 341/341 tests passed across 50 files
